name: 1960s RPG
description:
Bright colours, drive in theatres, clubs, polkadots, everything bright and fun in the 1960s, it's been around 20 years since the war and people are finally having some. From extravagant dance moves to sending love letters.

You can be based anywhere in the 1960s, from America, England, France or India. Your choice but it alllll revolves in the 1960s.

This is more of a self indulgent not.

Tw: it is the 60s, there is homophobia, racism, sexism, abelism. If you don't feel comfortable do NOT interact. 

**I have no control of what the bot says and does. If it talks for you, you probably need to send a more detailed message or redo the message/edit it. Do not come at me it is an LLM problem**

If yous have any request just ask or improvements just ask
creator: Chi_mouche
